name: S-20 (SS-125)
events: 2 Mar 1942 USS S-20 arrived at New London, Connecticut from the Philadelphia Navy Yard.
17 Apr 1942 USS S-20 departed New London, Connecticut for Casco Bay, Maine.
18 Apr 1942 USS S-20 arrived at Casco Bay, Maine from New London, Connecticut.
24 May 1942 USS S-20 arrived at New London, Connecticut from Casco Bay, Maine.
20 Jul 1942 USS S-20 departed New London, Connecticut for Casco Bay, Maine.
21 Jul 1942 USS S-20 arrived at Casco Bay, Maine from New London, Connecticut.
28 Jul 1942 USS S-20 arrived at New London, Connecticut from Casco Bay, Maine.
30 Aug 1942 USS S-20 departed New London, Connecticut for Portsmouth, New Hampshire.
31 Aug 1942 USS S-20 arrived at the Portsmouth Navy Yard from New London, Connecticut for the installation of new torpedo firing equipment.
24 Nov 1942 Having completed her special torpedo firing tests, USS S-20, departed the Portsmouth Navy Yard for New London, Connecticut.
25 Nov 1942 USS S-20 arrived at New London, Connecticut from the Portsmouth Navy Yard.
8 Oct 1944 USS S-20 arrived at New London, Connecticut from Casco Bay, Maine.
2 Nov 1944 USS S-20 departed New London, Connecticut for Casco Bay, Maine.
3 Nov 1944 USS S-20 arrived at Casco Bay, Maine from New London, Connecticut.
19 Nov 1944 USS S-20 arrived at New London, Connecticut from Casco Bay, Maine.
26 Dec 1944 USS S-20 departed New London, Connecticut for Casco Bay, Maine.
27 Dec 1944 USS S-20 arrived at Casco Bay, Maine from New London, Connecticut.
4 Feb 1945 USS S-20 arrived at New London, Connecticut from Casco Bay, Maine.
12 May 1945 USS S-20 departed New London, Connecticut for Casco Bay, Maine.
13 May 1945 USS S-20 arrived at Casco Bay, Maine from New London, Connecticut.
22 May 1945 USS S-20 departed Casco Bay, Maine for New London, Connecticut.
2 Jul 1945 USS S-20 departed New London, Connecticut for the Philadelphia Navy Yard for decommissioning.
4 Jul 1945 USS S-20 arrived at the Philadelphia Navy Yard from New London, Connecticut for decommissioning.
